hero.title: Supporting You Through Every Step of Your Journey
hero.description: We provide free of charge palliative care and support for families across Leicestershire, Nottinghamshire & Lincolnshire.

careServices.title: Care and Comfort Where You Need It Most
careServices.intro: From specialist nursing to emotional support, we provide free, compassionate care for individuals and families within our local community.

cards.title: Day Care
cards.description: Expert nursing support and symptom management in a social 'home-from-home' environment.

cards.title: Wellbeing Sessions
cards.description: Holistic support for individuals and carers.

cards.title: Social-sitting
cards.description: Vital respite for unpaid carers. Our fully-trained volunteers provide companionship for your loved one at home.

cards.title: Counselling & emotional support
cards.description: Compassionate support for individuals, families and carers through every stage of your journey.

videoFeature.title: Watch our Short Video to See the Difference We Make for Local Families

shopsSection.title: Our Local Charity Shops
shopsSection.intro: Every purchase from our charity shops and online stores support the work of our hospice in Stathern.

reachSection.title: Care that's within everyone's reach
reachSection.description: Our hospice lies in the heart of our rural community. Our fleet of wheelchair-accessible vehicles, supported by dedicated volunteer drivers, ensures that no matter where you live within our 10-mile catchment area, expert palliative care is always within reach.

sideCards.title: Wheelchair-Accessible Transport Available
sideCards.description: Available for all Day Hospice guests

supportSection.title: Help us Keep Our Doors Open
supportSection.intro: It costs over £705,000 each year to provide our specialist care free of charge to local families. We rely on the kindness of our local community to ensure no family faces life-limiting conditions alone.

cards.title: Make a Donation
cards.description: Whether it is a one-off gift or a monthly contribution, your support directly funds our nursing care and family support.

cards.title: Volunteer
cards.description: Join the Dove family! We are always looking for friendly faces to help support our work.

cards.title: Fundraise For Us
cards.description: From coffee mornings to marathons, turn your passion into support for local families.

cards.title: Leave a Legacy
cards.description: A gift in your Will is a wonderful way to ensure that future generations receive the care they deserve.

impactSection.title: See the Impact Your Gift Will Have

cards.title: A Home-Cooked Meal
cards.description: Pays for a guest's nutritious, three-course home-cooked lunch tailored to their individual dietary needs.

cards.title: Dementia Support
cards.description: Funds two hours of respite care for a family living with Dementia.

cards.title: Nursing Care
cards.description: Provides a full day of specialist palliative nursing care and social support for one guest.
